cities.name: Beijing
cities.notes: Forbidden City, Great Wall day trip, Temple of Heaven and Hutong lanes

cities.name: Shanghai
cities.notes: Bund waterfront skyline, French Concession and Yu Garden bazaar

cities.name: Xi'an
cities.notes: Terracotta Army, Ancient City Walls cycling and Muslim Quarter night market

cities.name: Chengdu
cities.notes: Giant Panda Research Base, mahjong culture and fiery Sichuan hot pot

cities.name: Guilin
cities.notes: Karst limestone peaks, Li River bamboo raft and Yangshuo rice paddies

cities.name: Hangzhou
cities.notes: West Lake gardens, Longjing tea plantations and Song Dynasty Town
